# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security issue, please do not open a public issue first.

Use one of the following channels:

- Open a private security advisory on GitHub (preferred)
- Contact the maintainer directly

Please include:

- Impact and affected components
- Reproduction steps or proof of concept
- Suggested mitigation (if available)

We will acknowledge valid reports as quickly as possible and provide updates during triage.
